title: nephrolepis abrupta
intro: Nephrolepis abrupta, also known as the abrupt sword fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Pacific Islands, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Nephrolepis abrupta is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are applied topically or ingested to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
